## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this has not already been reported
- [ ] I have included the full error message and stack trace (if applicable)
- [ ] I have redacted all credentials and secrets from logs and config
- [ ] I am running a supported Python version (3.11+)
- [ ] I have confirmed Ollama is running and the embedding model is available
